description: Classic, understated class is what this original police fragrance for men is all about. It has notes of bergamot, grapefruit, juniper, lavender, rosemary, peppermint, jasmine, geranium, violet, clary sage, sandalwood, cedar, moss, musk and tonka bean.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
